title: Shield Icons
description: Adds to 2d icons to shields in the game, making them more in line with other equipment.
body:
With this pack installed, shields will be displayed as 2d sprites in inventories, when dropped on the ground or displayed in item frames. The pack also alters the off-hand inventory icon to reflect these new icons.

Having a total of 17 sprites, one for the basic shield and the other 16 for the banner shield colors. An important thing to keep in mind is that this pack does not display the details of banner shields, only their base colors.
